<reflection>the circumfix "makipag-an" attaches to the root "sapak". the prefix "makipag-" assimilates to the root-initial consonant 's', resulting in 'makipag-'. the suffix '-an' is then attached, forming 'makipag-sapak-an'.</reflection>
<answer>makipagsapakan</answer>
